texts.label: text
texts.orig: We provide drivers with FREE self-contained FB accommodation with hot showers.
texts.text: We provide drivers with FREE self-contained FB accommodation with hot showers.

texts.label: text
texts.orig: We are connected to the main power grid so have power 24/7. Our self-contained rooms have instant showers. We have Wi-Fi in the common area.
texts.text: We are connected to the main power grid so have power 24/7. Our self-contained rooms have instant showers. We have Wi-Fi in the common area.
